SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:OutboxDao.kt$OutboxDao$@Query("DELETE FROM outbox WHERE createdAt < :cutoff") suspend fun deleteOlderThan(cutoff: Long)
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:OutboxDao.kt$OutboxDao$@Query("DELETE FROM outbox WHERE id = :id") suspend fun deleteById(id: Long)
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:OutboxDao.kt$OutboxDao$@Query("DELETE FROM outbox WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM outbox ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT :max)") suspend fun trimToMax(max: Int)
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:OutboxDao.kt$OutboxDao$@Query("SELECT * FROM outbox ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT :limit") suspend fun oldest(limit: Int): List<OutboxEntity>
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:OutboxDao.kt$OutboxDao$@Query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outbox") fun countFlow(): Flow<Int>
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:OutboxDao.kt$OutboxDao$@Query("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outbox") suspend fun count(): Int
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithAnnotations:OutboxDao.kt$OutboxDao$@Query("UPDATE outbox SET attemptCount = attemptCount + 1 WHERE id = :id") suspend fun bumpAttempt(id: Long)
